Id1.text: Meringue is an ingredient of a Baked Alaska, which is from the New York region and France.

Id2.text: Meringue is an ingredient of a Baked Alaska, which is reputed to come from both France and New York.

Id3.text: An ingredient of baked Alaska is meringue which originates in France and the New York regions.
